features: Effective Nail Cleaning: The 20 Pcs Nail Brushes are designed specifically for cleaning fingernails and toenails, helping you remove dirt, dust, and other residue easily from underneath and around your nails
Ergonomic Handle Grip: Featuring a handle grip, each brush provides comfortable control, allowing for precise and effortless cleaning, even in hard-to-reach areas.
Durable Plastic Bristles: The sturdy plastic bristles of the brush offer effective cleaning without being harsh on your nails, ensuring a gentle yet thorough cleaning experience
Multipurpose Use: Perfect for home use, manicure prep, or professional salons, these brushes are versatile tools for keeping your nails pristine and free from dirt during regular care

Value Pack of 20 Brushes: With 20 brushes in a pack, you have plenty to use at home, share with family, or store for future use. The compact size makes it easy to carry them on the go for quick cleaning whenever you need it
description: Product description Keep your nails looking fresh and clean with this 20 Pcs Nail Brushes for Cleaning Nails set. Designed for both fingernails and toenails, these small yet effective plastic nail brushes make it easy to remove dirt, dust, and residue from under and around your nails. Featuring a handle grip for easy control, each brush ensures you can comfortably clean even the hardest-to-reach areas. The sturdy bristles are perfect for thorough cleaning without being too harsh on your nails. Whether you're prepping for a manicure or simply want to keep your nails free of dirt, these brushes are the ideal tool. This pack of 20 ensures you have plenty of brushes for use at home, in the salon, or as a handy nail cleaning tool on the go. Safety Warning NO
